mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,SEQ AS seq ,LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN AS lenFldOffsetLen ,FLD_DATA_LEN AS fldDataLen ,FLD_CFG_VAL AS fldCfgVal ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBINTRFCROUTINFODT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{seq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{lenFldOffsetLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND FLD_DATA_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{fldDataLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND FLD_CFG_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{fldCfgVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBINTRFCROUTINFODT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{seq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{lenFldOffsetLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND FLD_DATA_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{fldDataLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND FLD_CFG_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{fldCfgVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,SEQ AS seq ,LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN AS lenFldOffsetLen ,FLD_DATA_LEN AS fldDataLen ,FLD_CFG_VAL AS fldCfgVal ,RUTNG_DESC AS rutngDesc ,CNDT_CD AS cndtCd FROM TBINTRFCROUTINFODT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCROUTINFODT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
